title: Bionano Genomics Inc (BNGO) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Cost Reductions and Margin Improvement
text: Bionano Genomics (NASDAQ: BNGO) demonstrated significant operational improvements in Q4 2024. The company achieved a significant improvement in GAAP gross margin for Q4 2024, rising to 42% from 23% in Q4 2023. Additionally, operating expenses dropped substantially, declining to $15.4 million from $27.4 million year-over-year. Despite revenue headwinds, the company showed targeted growth in specific segments. Consumable sales climbed 14% throughout 2024, while geographic expansion showed promise with sales in the Americas and EMEA regions growing by 9% and 10% respectively in 2024. Total Q4 revenue fell 24% compared to the prior year to $8.2 million. The company extended cash runway into Q1 2026, providing near-term financial stability. Management emphasized a focused approach, concentrating on routine-use customers rather than broader market expansion. The newly launched Stratus compute system received positive initial feedback and should enhance system utilization among existing accounts. For 2025, the company expected revenue in the range of $29-32 million with Q1 2025 guidance of $6.2-6.3 million.
